title: astragalus vaccarum
intro: Astragalus vaccarum, also known as Vaccaria, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae, and is often referred to as cow cockle. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are associated with its ability to support immune function, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Astragalus vaccarum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular natural remedy among herbalists and health enthusiasts.
